# https://animasai.co/llms.txt
# This file helps AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) understand
# the structure and content of the Animas AI website.

> Animas AI is a premium "Agents as a Service" automation agency founded by Tyler Mayberry. We build, host, and maintain custom AI agent workflows for small and mid-sized businesses on a flat-rate monthly retainer. Every client's first automation workflow is delivered in 7 days or the engagement is fully refunded. Ongoing requests are fulfilled within 48 hours. All infrastructure costs (API fees, hosting, security) are included. The automation stack is powered by the proprietary OpenClaw Framework.

## Pages

- /: Homepage introducing the Animas AI "Agents as a Service" model, the 7-day delivery guarantee, the 5-step engagement pipeline (Discovery, Architecture, Build, Integrate, Scale), and an embedded video demonstration of a real automation workflow.
- /how-it-works: Detailed breakdown of the Animas AI retainer model. Covers the flat-rate unlimited automation request model, 48-hour turnaround SLA, fully managed infrastructure, and how the onboarding process works from audit to live deployment.
- /solutions: Catalog of automation solutions Animas AI delivers, including automated SEO content pipelines, CRM data synchronization, document intelligence and analytics, outbound lead research, and operational reporting. Each solution is framed around business outcomes and ROI.
- /case-studies: Real-world case studies demonstrating measurable results from Animas AI automation deployments. Includes The Brander Group case study with specific metrics on hours saved and operational efficiency gains.
- /blog/: Index of all Animas AI blog articles covering business automation, AI workflow strategy, and operational efficiency for non-technical SMB owners.

## Blog Articles

- /blog/consulting-lead-handling-problem: Reframes lead generation as a lead handling problem for founder-led B2B consulting firms (3-20 employees) — covering first response speed, intake quality, qualification, routing, and follow-up failures that lose good leads after inquiry; explains why founder-led firms are especially vulnerable due to founder bottleneck, unsystemized sales, and active client work competing with response speed; quantifies the invisible cost of lost meetings, lower close rates, inconsistent pipeline, and unseen revenue leaks; closes with a workflow audit CTA.
- /blog/hotel-win-channel-intro: Introduction to the Hotel Win channel philosophy — AI handles mundane/robotic hospitality tasks so chronically understaffed teams can return to actual human connection; preview of upcoming content on AI voice assistants for 100% call capture, authentic automated review responses, and dynamic pricing algorithms for independent operators.
- /blog/ai-agents-hospitality-future: Deep dive into how AI agents are reshaping hospitality distribution — covering schema.org visibility and the ghost hotel problem, attribute-based pricing and A2A APIs, the unbundling of hotel services, dynamic housekeeping with IoT sensors, predictive maintenance and Hilton's billion-dollar HVAC case study, OpenClaw security architecture and shadow AI risks, the three non-negotiable vendor questions (PMS write access, websocket sandboxing, model drift protocol), hidden 1.6x cost multiplier, EU vs. Middle East regulatory fracture, and the 80/20 path for independent operators starting at $100/month.
- /blog/openclaw-for-hotel-owners: Introduction to OpenClaw for hotel and vacation rental owners — covering channels/skills/agents architecture, live demos (2am late checkout response, group booking email draft), four immediate use cases (guest questions, booking leads, team alerts, marketing research), and an honest assessment of setup requirements and prerequisites.
- /blog/openclaw-cloud-architecture: Deep dive into OpenClaw cloud architecture for AI automation — covering the coding loop (orchestrator/QA manager/coding agent), content loop (researcher/creator/producer), containerization security model, why Nemo Claw's model lock is a dealbreaker, and running multi-agent automations locally vs. in the cloud.
- /blog/openclaw-google-workspace-setup: Full walkthrough of connecting OpenClaw to Google Workspace via the GOG skill — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, and People API setup with OAuth 2.0 and a live demo sending a birthday invitation, creating a calendar event, and organizing Drive files.

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Core offer: Custom AI automation agents on a flat-rate monthly retainer ("Agents as a Service")
- Guarantee: First workflow delivered in 7 calendar days or full refund
- SLA: 48-hour turnaround on all ongoing automation requests
- Pricing model: Flat-rate retainer; inquiry-only (no public pricing)
- Included: Hosting, API costs, security, and maintenance
- Technology stack: OpenClaw Framework (proprietary)
- Founder: Tyler Mayberry (YouTube: @mayberrytyler)
- Contact: tyler@animasai.co
- Website: https://animasai.co
